steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: The introductory phrase describes Mount Leuser, but the independent clause still needs a finite main verb. The phrase after the blank, among Aceh's tallest mountains, cannot supply that verb.

steps.title: Use a finite verb
steps.content: B is an infinitive, C is a present participle, and D is a participial phrase; none can act as the main verb of the clause. The finite passive verb completes the sentence grammatically. The answer is A.
